evidence.quote: A total of 157 therapeutic recombinant antibody products that received FDA approval up to May 2023 were compiled using Microsoft Excel
based on an internal product list that tracks Biologic License Applications (BLAs) for biotechnology products, maintained at the FDA's Office of Biotechnology Products (OBP)
extracted from public databases including the FDA Label database (http://fdalabel.fda.gov/fdalabel-r/ui/search) and the Antibody Therapeutics Product Data database managed by the Antibody Society
CHO (76%), NS0 (11%), and Sp2/0 (6%)... IgG1 constitutes the majority (78%), followed by IgG2 (7%), IgG4 (13%), and hybrid IgG1/2 and IgG2/4 (2%)
obtained from the drug substance release specifications and characterization section of the electronic common technical document (eCTD)

extracted quantitative N-glycan profiles from 119 eCTDs... CHO (n=95), NS0 (n=16), and sp2/0 (n=8)... excluded... other three cell lines (n=10)... coformulation products... (n=6)... non-glycosylated (n=5), afucosylated (n=4), and low fucosylated (n=3)

CHO (n=95), which was further divided into five subgroups... (A) typical IgG1 mAbs (n=57), (B) IgG1 reference products (n=4) and biosimilars (n=23)... (C) other types of IgG1s... (n=10), (D) non-IgG1 antibodies... (n=24), and (E) IgG1 Fc-fusion proteins (n=4)
percentage values... were rounded to whole numbers above 1%, to one decimal place for values between 0.5% and 1%, and to zero for values less than 0.5%
individual glycan species were sorted based on their mean relative abundance
visually represented in a scatter plot using GraphPad Prism 9.5.1
N-glycan structures were drawn following the Symbol Nomenclature for Glycans (SNFG) guidelines [14]
14. Neelamegham S... Updates to the Symbol Nomenclature for Glycans guidelines. Glycobiology. 2019

identified nine prevalent glycan epitopes... terminal N-acetylglucosamine, core fucose, terminal galactose, high mannose, α-galactose, terminal α2,3-linked N-acetylneuraminic acid, terminal... N-glycolylneuraminic acid, triantennary structure, and bisecting N-acetylglucosamine
terminal NGNA with mostly α2,6- linkage
25. Ghaderi D... Implications of the presence of N-glycolylneuraminic acid... 28. Ferrara C... Unique carbohydrate-carbohydrate interactions...
